resources.string: Opwa monika opolohalama yimwe yi pe. Owahala oku yi wedela?
Oshikwa elektronika shoye otashi dulika itashi longo pamakufikufi opaintaneta Alikana Shilipaleka kutya omakufikufi oye opaItaneta otaalongo ndele toningi vali (%1$d).
Opena oupyakadi eshi toyi kepandja loNetflix. Aluka vali moshikando tashiya(%1$d).
Opolohalama ei yoNetflix itayi dulu okulonga moshikwaelectronika shoye (%1$d).
Shilipaleka kutya oshikwaelektronika shoye osha kwatafana nomalungula oItaneta nosho yo efiku nosho yo efimbo lokuningifa oli li mondjila (%1$d).
Ombili itatu dulu oku longifa o-Netflix Alikana tala opo pwanyolwa setting opo ne ninga omakwatathano noomalungula ndele to longifa opolohalama yoNetflix (%1$d).
Ombili ota tu dulu okuya longifa o-Netflix Aluka vali moshikando tashiya. Ngeenge oupyakadi owa twikile ohatu ku indile wuye kepandja letu loNetflix (0000).
Ombili itatu dulu oku longifa o-Netflix Alikana temununa opolohalama yoye yoNetflix (%1$d).
Oshikwa elektronika shoye kashina oikwa noipangifo yawana opo opolohalama yoNetflix yilongelemo(%1$d).
Opolohalama ei yoNetflix itayi dulu okulonga moshikwaelektronika shoye (%1$d).
Oshikwaeletronika eshi inashi longwa shilongifwe o-Netflix (%1$d).
